blended.narrative: Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 40°F.
Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
